prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Mistfell in a leather apron with ash-stained gloves stand at a cluttered workbench. They are focused on a complex, brass clockwork artifact. Celestia gently holds the artifact's frame steady while Ren uses a small precision tool to nudge a misaligned gear. Warm tavern lighting, anime style, high-quality character design, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild workshop shot, Ren Mistfell completes the adjustment of the gear with her tool, and the brass clockwork artifact clicks into place with a soft hum, emitting a gentle golden light. Celestia Vale smiles in relief, and Ren wipes her brow with a gloved hand, both sharing a moment of professional satisfaction. Consistent lighting and character appearance, no text, no watermark.
